    FROM [Employees] AS [e]
    LEFT JOIN [EmployeeBanks] AS [e0] ON [e].[Id] = [e0].[EmployeeId]
    WHERE [e].[Id] = @id
) AS [s]
LEFT JOIN [EmployeeAddresses] AS [e1] ON [s].[Id] = [e1].[EmployeeId]
LEFT JOIN [EmployeeEducations] AS [e2] ON [s].[Id] = [e2].[EmployeeId]
LEFT JOIN [EmployeeExperiences] AS [e3] ON [s].[Id] = [e3].[EmployeeId]
LEFT JOIN [EmployeeSkills] AS [e4] ON [s].[Id] = [e4].[EmployeeId]
LEFT JOIN [EmployeeTrainings] AS [e5] ON [s].[Id] = [e5].[EmployeeId]
LEFT JOIN [EmployeeCertifications] AS [e6] ON [s].[Id] = [e6].[EmployeeId]
LEFT JOIN [EmployeeDocuments] AS [e7] ON [s].[Id] = [e7].[EmployeeId]
LEFT JOIN [EmployeeEmergencyContacts] AS [e8] ON [s].[Id] = [e8].[EmployeeId]
ORDER BY [s].[Id], [s].[Id0], [e1].[Id], [e2].[Id], [e3].[Id], [e4].[Id], [e5].[Id], [e6].[Id], [e7].[Id]

    SELECT TOP(1) [e].[Id], [e].[AlternatePhoneNumber], [e].[AppUserId], [e].[BasicSalary], [e].[BloodGroup], [e].[ConfirmationDate], [e].[CreatedBy], [e].[CreatedDate], [e].[DateOfBirth], [e].[DateOfJoining], [e].[DateOfLeaving], [e].[DepartmentId], [e].[DesignationId], [e].[EmployeeCode], [e].[EmploymentStatus], [e].[EmploymentType], [e].[FirstName], [e].[FullName], [e].[Gender], [e].[IsActive], [e].[LastName], [e].[MaritalStatus], [e].[MiddleName], [e].[MobileNumber], [e].[NationalId], [e].[Nationality], [e].[OfficialEmail], [e].[PassportExpiryDate], [e].[PassportNumber], [e].[PersonalEmail], [e].[PhotoUrl], [e].[ProbationEndDate], [e].[Religion], [e].[ReportingManagerId], [e].[SalaryCurrency], [e].[SignatureUrl], [e].[UpdatedBy], [e].[UpdatedDate], [e].[WorkLocation], [e0].[Id] AS [Id0], [e0].[AccountHolderName], [e0].[AccountNumber], [e0].[BankName], [e0].[BranchName], [e0].[CreatedBy] AS [CreatedBy0], [e0].[CreatedDate] AS [CreatedDate0], [e0].[Currency], [e0].[EmployeeId], [e0].[IbanNumber], [e0].[IsActive] AS [IsActive0], [e0].[RoutingNumber], [e0].[SwiftCode], [e0].[UpdatedBy] AS [UpdatedBy0], [e0].[UpdatedDate] AS [UpdatedDate0]
    FROM [Employees] AS [e]
    LEFT JOIN [EmployeeBanks] AS [e0] ON [e].[Id] = [e0].[EmployeeId]
    WHERE [e].[Id] = @id
) AS [s]
LEFT JOIN [EmployeeAddresses] AS [e1] ON [s].[Id] = [e1].[EmployeeId]
LEFT JOIN [EmployeeEducations] AS [e2] ON [s].[Id] = [e2].[EmployeeId]
LEFT JOIN [EmployeeExperiences] AS [e3] ON [s].[Id] = [e3].[EmployeeId]
LEFT JOIN [EmployeeSkills] AS [e4] ON [s].[Id] = [e4].[EmployeeId]
LEFT JOIN [EmployeeTrainings] AS [e5] ON [s].[Id] = [e5].[EmployeeId]
LEFT JOIN [EmployeeCertifications] AS [e6] ON [s].[Id] = [e6].[EmployeeId]
LEFT JOIN [EmployeeDocuments] AS [e7] ON [s].[Id] = [e7].[EmployeeId]
LEFT JOIN [EmployeeEmergencyContacts] AS [e8] ON [s].[Id] = [e8].[EmployeeId]
ORDER BY [s].[Id], [s].[Id0], [e1].[Id], [e2].[Id], [e3].[Id], [e4].[Id], [e5].[Id], [e6].[Id], [e7].[Id]
